    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly

    toc_float: true

    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#.libPaths("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/personal/mmkhan/R/4.1/")

```

```{r}
PATH <- "/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/"
FIGURES <- '/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/results/bsanjana_figures'

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(K2Taxonomer)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(parallel)
library(ggrastr)
```


# Analysis of e7386-related samples for immune compartment

* If you want to access results from following analysis please refer to `01.e7386_general_analysis.{Rmd.html}`.
1. Creating seurat object from relevant samples.
2. Norm, clustering and dimensionality reduction.
3. singleR cell-type annotation (not run here but stratification done per cluster and trt group)
4. cluster and trt group level differential and pathway analysis.

* If you want to access the results from immune compartment please refer to `02.e7386_immune_compt{Rmd,html}`

* This file contains analysis pertaining to the epithelial compartment:
1. recluster epi compartment, quantify and find significant cell-types between trt groups
2. run k2t to get cluster similarity and apply signature enrichment with signatures from Hallmark, Puram et. al, Yanai et. al, e7386/icg001.
3. annotate cells into sub-types with consideration of enrichment analysis defined in 2
4. quantify and find significant cell-types between trt groups across coarser/main types
4.1 if significant, find differences between trt groups
5. Study wnt/b-cat signaling signatures and changes per group

## Epithelial Compartment

```{r eval=F}
e7386_obj_new <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_09_e7386_seurat_filtered_main_final.rds"))
```

```{r eval=F}
e7386_epi <- subset(e7386_obj_new, fcm_cell_type == "Epithelial" & seurat_clusters %in% c(4,7,8,9,10,11,16,20))
table(e7386_epi$treatment)
table(e7386_epi$seurat_clusters)
```

```{r eval=F}
e7386_epi <- PercentageFeatureSet(e7386_epi, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
e7386_epi <- NormalizeData(e7386_epi, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
e7386_epi <- FindVariableFeatures(e7386_epi, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(e7386_epi)
e7386_epi <- ScaleData(e7386_epi, all.genes)
```

Explained PC variance

```{r eval=F}
e7386_epi <- SCTransform(e7386_epi, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE,  method = "glmGamPoi")
e7386_epi <- RunPCA(e7386_epi, verbose = FALSE)

ElbowPlot(e7386_epi, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)

mat <- Seurat::GetAssayData(e7386_epi, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")
pca <- e7386_epi[["pca"]]

# Get the total variance:
total_variance <- sum(matrixStats::rowVars(mat))

eigValues = (pca@stdev)^2  ## EigenValues
varExplained = eigValues / total_variance
varExplained
sum(varExplained)
sum(varExplained[1:15])

```

```{r eval=F}
# run sctransform
e7386_epi <- RunUMAP(e7386_epi, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)

e7386_epi <- FindNeighbors(e7386_epi, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
e7386_epi <- FindClusters(e7386_epi, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.5, random.seed = 1234, algorithm = "leiden")
saveRDS(e7386_epi, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_09_e7386_epi.rds"))
```

## Load object

```{r}
e7386_epi <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_01_09_e7386_epi.rds"))
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
#to export - NOTE: only the raw counts were exported to BT due to some issue with SCT normalised counts
rBCS::ExportSeurat(
  object = e7386_epi,
  bcs.path = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_06_13_e7386_epi_BT.bcs"),
  batch.name = "treatment",
  unique.limit = 200,
  raw.rna = "RNA", # Assay that has raw count of RNA
  norm.rna = "RNA", # Assay that has normalized count of RNA  
  overwrite = TRUE # Overwrite existing bcs file
)
```

```{r}
d <- DimPlot(object = e7386_epi, reduction = "umap", label = T, label.size = 5, label.box = T) + NoLegend()
d

#ggsave(plot = d, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_28_e7386_epi_sub_types_umap.png"), width = 6, height = 4)

d <- DimPlot(object = e7386_epi, reduction = "umap", label = T, split.by = "treatment") + NoLegend()
d
#ggsave(plot = d, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/01_09_e7386_epi_umap_trt.png"), width = 12, height = 5)
```

```{r}
pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'Fig4A_epi_UMAP.pdf'))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_epi, label = TRUE, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label.box = TRUE) +
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle(NULL)
rasterize(d, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'Fig4A_epi_UMAP_1.5x.pdf'))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_epi, label = TRUE, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label.box = TRUE, label.size = 6) +
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle(NULL) + 
  FontSize(
    x.text = 18,
    y.text = 18,
    x.title = 18,
    y.title = 18,
    main = NULL
)
rasterize(d, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
pdf(file = file.path(FIGURES, 'Fig4A_epi_UMAP_2x.pdf'))
d <- DimPlot(e7386_epi, label = TRUE, group.by = "seurat_clusters", label.box = TRUE, label.size = 8) + 
  NoLegend() +
  ggtitle(NULL) +
  FontSize(
    x.text = 24,
    y.text = 24,
    x.title = 24,
    y.title = 24,
    main = NULL
)
rasterize(d, layers = 'Point', dpi = 500)
dev.off()
```



```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrastr)

# Extract UMAP embeddings and cluster identities
umap_df <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(e7386_epi, "umap"))
umap_df$cluster <- Idents(e7386_epi)

# Optional: add cluster label positions (e.g., cluster medians)
cluster_labels <- aggregate(. ~ cluster, data = umap_df, FUN = median)

# Plot using ggplot with rasterized points
p <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, color = cluster)) +
  rasterise(geom_point(size = 1), dpi = 600) +
  geom_text(data = cluster_labels, aes(label = cluster), size = 6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "UMAP_1", y = "UMAP_2") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 21, family = "Arial", color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 21, family = "Arial", color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, family = "Arial", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, family = "Arial", color = "black"),
    axis.line    = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks   = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

# Save to PDF with vector fonts and rasterized points
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(FIGURES, "Fig4A_epi_UMAP_final.pdf"),
  plot = p,
  device = cairo_pdf,
  width = 6,
  height = 5
)

```


## Quantify

```{r relative_proportion_wrapper}
rel_prop <- function(obj, cond1, cond2, cols=NULL) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 1))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "percent")
  
  dat <- dat %>% 
  group_by_at(cond1) %>% 
  mutate(cluster_label_y = 1 - (cumsum(percent) - 0.5 * percent)) %>% 
  ungroup()
  
d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(cond1, y = "percent", fill = cond2)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_text(aes(y = cluster_label_y, label = round(100 * percent, 2)), col="white", fontface="bold", size=3)+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10))) 

if(!is.null(cols)){ 
  d <- d1 +  scale_fill_manual(values = cols)
} else {
  d <- d1
}
d
}

```

```{r}
rel_prop_boxplot <- function(obj, cond1, cond2) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 2))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "number")
  dat$treatment <- meta_data$treatment[match(dat$sample, meta_data$Sample_ID)]

d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = cond2, y = "number", fill = "treatment")) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), legend.position = "bottom") +
  ylab("%")
  
d1
}

```

```{r}
r1 <- rel_prop(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "treatment", cond1 = "seurat_clusters")
r1
#ggsave(plot = r1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/01_30_e7386_epi_clust_trt_prop.png"), width = 8, height = 2.5)

rel_prop(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "treatment", cond1 = "seurat_clusters")
```

```{r}
r2 <- rel_prop_boxplot(obj = e7386_epi, cond1 = "sample", cond2 = "seurat_clusters")
r2
#ggsave(plot = r2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/01_30_e7386_epi_clust_prop_boxplot.png"), width = 8, height = 2.5)

rel_prop(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "treatment", cond1 = "seurat_clusters")
```

```{r ftest, eval=F}
ftest_epi <- function(samples){
  df1 <- e7386_epi@meta.data
  df1 <- df1[df1$treatment %in% samples,]
  df1$treatment <- factor(df1$treatment, levels = samples)
  tmp <- table(df1$epi_sub, df1$treatment)
  df2 <- data.frame(tmp[,1], tmp[,2])
  colnames(df2) <- colnames(tmp)
  df2 <- df2 %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pval=sapply(
    rownames(df2), function(z) fisher.test(table(df1$epi_sub==z, df1$treatment))$p.value)) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(qval=p.adjust(pval, method = "BH")) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(sig=ifelse(qval<=0.01, "***",  ifelse(qval <= 0.05, "*", ""))) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(pval)
  df2

}
ftest_epi(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg"))
ftest_epi(samples = c("4NQO control", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))
ftest_epi(samples = c("4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg", "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg"))

#Fisher's test 
ftest <- fisher.test(table(e7386_epi$epi_subtype, e7386_epi$treatment), simulate.p.value = T)
ftest
```

```{r}
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
library(webshot)
dat_tab1 <- e7386_epi@meta.data[, c('singleRcelltype', 'treatment')]
tbl_summary_2 <- tbl_summary(dat_tab1, by = treatment, percent = "column")

gt2 <- tbl_summary_2  %>%  as_gt()   # convert to gt table
gt2
# gt2 %>% tab_options(column_labels.font.size=12) %>% gt::gtsave(# save table as image
#     filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/epi_trt_clusters.png"),
#   ) 

#webshot("../results/4nqo_e7386_images/epi_trt.png", "../results/4nqo_e7386_images/epi_trt_adj.png", vwidth  = 1000, vheight = 500)


dat_tab1 <- e7386_epi@meta.data[, c('seurat_clusters', 'treatment')]
#dat_tab1 <- dat_tab1 %>% mutate(`Sample_ID` = factor(`Sample_ID`, levels =c("KM_BM_0318_1C", "KM_BM_0319_1", "KM_BM_0318_5NC", "KM_BM_0319_5")))
tbl_summary_2 <- tbl_summary(dat_tab1, by = treatment, percent = "column")

gt2 <- tbl_summary_2  %>%  as_gt()   # convert to gt table
gt2
# gt2 %>% tab_options(column_labels.font.size=12) %>% gt::gtsave(# save table as image
#     filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/epi_trt_clusters.png"),
#   ) 
# 
# webshot("../results/4nqo_e7386_images/epi_trt.png", "../results/4nqo_e7386_images/epi_trt_adj.png", vwidth  = 1000, vheight = 500)
```

## FCM

```{r eval=F}
clusters <- levels(e7386_epi$seurat_clusters)
famRes <- do.call(bind_rows, mclapply(clusters, function(clust) {

  clRes <- FindConservedMarkers(e7386_epi,
                                ident.1 = clust,
                                grouping.var = "sample",
                                assay = "SCT",
                                meta.method = metap::maximump,
                                test.use = "MAST",
                                logfc.threshold = 0.25,
                                min.cells.group = 5,
                                only.pos = TRUE,
                                verbose = FALSE)

  if(nrow(clRes) > 0) {
    clRes <- data.frame(cluster = clust, gene = rownames(clRes), clRes)
  } else {
    clRes <- NULL
  }

  return(clRes)

}, mc.cores = 6))

rownames(famRes) <- NULL

# Fix column names
colnames(famRes) <- sub("minimump_", "maximump_", colnames(famRes))

# Fix false discovery rate
famRes$maximump_fdr <- p.adjust(famRes$maximump_p_val, method = "BH")

# Get minimum logFC
famRes$maximump_logFC <- apply(famRes[, grepl("avg_log2FC", colnames(famRes))],  1, min, na.rm = TRUE)

# Sort columns
firstCols <- c(1, 2,
  grep("maximump_", colnames(famRes)),
  grep("max_pval", colnames(famRes)))
lastCols <- seq(ncol(famRes))[!seq(ncol(famRes)) %in% firstCols]
famRes_mod <- famRes[, c(firstCols, lastCols)]

famRes_mod
write.csv(famRes_mod, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/01_09_fcm_e7386_epi.csv"), quote = F)
```

clusters split into different sheets

```{r eval=F}
famRes_mod <- read.csv(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/01_09_fcm_e7386_epi.csv"))
f1 <- famRes_mod %>% group_split(cluster)

sheets <- list("cluster1"= f1[[1]],
               "cluster2"= f1[[2]],
               "cluster3"= f1[[3]],
               "cluster4"= f1[[4]],
               "cluster5"= f1[[5]],
               "cluster6"= f1[[6]],
               "cluster7"= f1[[7]],
               "cluster8"= f1[[8]],
               "cluster9"= f1[[9]],
               "cluster10"= f1[[10]],
               "cluster11"= f1[[11]],
               "cluster12"= f1[[12]],
               "cluster13"= f1[[13]],
               "cluster14"= f1[[14]])
#writexl::write_xlsx(sheets, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2024_03_12_fcm_epi_split.xlsx"))
```


```{r}
famRes_mod <- read.csv(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/01_09_fcm_e7386_epi.csv"))

clust4_w11 <- setdiff(famRes_mod[famRes_mod$cluster=="4", 'gene'], famRes_mod[!famRes_mod$cluster %in% c("4", "11"), 'gene'])
clust11_w4 <- setdiff(famRes_mod[famRes_mod$cluster=="11", 'gene'], famRes_mod[!famRes_mod$cluster %in% c("4", "11"), 'gene'])

clust11_wo4 <- setdiff(clust4_w11, clust11_w4)
clust4_wo11 <- setdiff(clust11_w4, clust4_w11)

stress_genes <- list(clust4_w11=clust4_w11, clust11_w4=clust11_w4, clust11_wo4=clust11_wo4, clust4_wo11=clust4_wo11)
# convert list to df
df <- stringi::stri_list2matrix(stress_genes, byrow=F, fill = " ")
colnames(df) <- names(stress_genes)
df
#write.csv(df, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/stress_unique_genes_per_clust.csv"), quote = F)
```

```{r}
famRes_mod %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    filter(maximump_fdr <= 0.05) %>%
    top_n(n = 20, wt = maximump_logFC) -> top20

top20
```


```{r}
rel_prop_boxplot_epi <- function(obj, cond1, cond2) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 1))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "number")
  dat$treatment <- meta_data$treatment[match(dat$sample, meta_data$Sample_ID)]

d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = cond2, y = "number", fill = "treatment")) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), legend.position = "bottom") +
  ylab("%")
  
d1
}
```

```{r}
Idents(e7386_epi) <- "seurat_clusters"
new_epi_clust <- c("Suprabasal", "Acinar slg", "Basal", "Stress", "cell cycle", "cell cycle", "Proliferating", "Suprabasal", "wnt", "?", "Stress", "Serous acinar slg", "Acinar slg", "Suprabasal")

levels(Idents(e7386_epi)) <- new_epi_clust
e7386_epi$new_epi_clust <- Idents(e7386_epi)

e7386_epi$new_epi_clust <- factor(e7386_epi$new_epi_clust, levels = c("Basal", "Suprabasal", "Acinar slg", "Serous acinar slg","cell cycle", "Proliferating",  "wnt", "?", "Stress"))
DimPlot(e7386_epi, group.by = "new_epi_clust", label = T) + NoLegend()
rel_prop( obj = e7386_epi, cond1 = "treatment", cond2 = "new_epi_clust")

r2 <- rel_prop_boxplot_epi(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "new_epi_clust", cond1 = "sample")
r2
#ggsave(plot = r2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/07_03_e7386_epi_clust_prop_boxplot.png"), width = 8, height = 5)

r3 <- rel_prop_boxplot(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "seurat_clusters", cond1 = "sample")
r3
#ggsave(plot = r3, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/05_23_e7386_epi_clust_prop_boxplot.png"), width = 8, height = 2.5)


rel_prop( obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "seurat_clusters", cond1 = "treatment")
rel_prop( obj = e7386_epi, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
```

### New Epi Subtype Labeling

Make "Prolif" cluster 7 as basal due to its lack of expression in CC genes/prolif genes - MKI67, TOP2A etc.,

Secretory 1 is Acinar slg and 2 is Serous acinar slg

```{r}

Idents(e7386_epi) <- "seurat_clusters"
new_epi_sub <- c("Suprabasal", "Secretory 1", "Basal", "Stress", "CC", "CC", "Basal", "Suprabasal", "Wnt", "Unknown", "Stress", "Secretory 2", "Secretory 1", "Suprabasal")

levels(Idents(e7386_epi)) <- new_epi_sub
e7386_epi$new_epi_sub <- Idents(e7386_epi)

e7386_epi$new_epi_sub <- factor(e7386_epi$new_epi_sub, levels = c("Basal", "Suprabasal", "Secretory 1", "Secretory 2","CC",  "Wnt", "Unknown", "Stress"))

DimPlot(e7386_epi, group.by = "new_epi_sub", label = T) + NoLegend()


r2 <- rel_prop_boxplot(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "new_epi_sub", cond1 = "sample")
r2
#ggsave(plot = r2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/07_03_e7386_epi_clust_prop_boxplot.png"), width = 8, height = 5)

r3 <- rel_prop_boxplot(obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "seurat_clusters", cond1 = "sample")
#ggsave(plot = r3, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/05_23_e7386_epi_clust_prop_boxplot.png"), width = 8, height = 2.5)


rel_prop( obj = e7386_epi, cond2 = "seurat_clusters", cond1 = "treatment")
rel_prop( obj = e7386_epi, cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cond2 = "treatment")
```

Barplot

```{r}
df <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(e7386_epi$treatment, e7386_epi$new_epi_sub), margin = 2))
colnames(df) <- c("Treatment", "Subtype", "Prop")

df$Prop <- round(df$Prop, 2)
ggplot(df, aes(x = Subtype, y = Prop, color = Treatment, fill = Treatment)) + 
  geom_bar( position = "stack", stat = "identity") +
  geom_label(aes(label = Prop), colour = "white", fontface = "bold", label.size = 0.025, position=position_stack(vjust=0.5)) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank(), 
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), 
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text= element_blank(),
        axis.title.y.left = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x.bottom = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y.left = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", 
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank())+
  NoLegend()
```

Lineplot rel. prop

```{r}
rel_prop_lineplot <- function (df, x, y, group, cols) {
  g <- ggplot(data=df, aes_string(x=x, y=y, group=group, color=group)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_line(size=1)+
  geom_point(size=3)+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), 
        axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size=8), axis.text.y.left = element_text(size=10, face = "bold"))
  if(!is.null(cols)) {
     g <- g+scale_color_manual(values = cols)
     g
  } else {
    g
  }
}
```

```{r}
epi_cells <- data.frame(prop.table(table(e7386_epi$new_epi_sub, e7386_epi$treatment), margin = 1))
epi_cells$Var1 <- factor(epi_cells$Var1)
epi_cells$Var2 <- factor(epi_cells$Var2)
colnames(epi_cells) <- c("Sub-type", "Treatment", "Rel. Prop")

rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = "Treatment", y = '`Rel. Prop`', group='`Sub-type`', cols = NULL)
rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = '`Sub-type`', y = '`Rel. Prop`', group="Treatment", cols = NULL)

```

```{r}
epi_cells <- data.frame(prop.table(table(e7386_epi$new_epi_sub, e7386_epi$treatment), margin = 2))
epi_cells$Var1 <- factor(epi_cells$Var1)
epi_cells$Var2 <- factor(epi_cells$Var2)
colnames(epi_cells) <- c("Sub-type", "Treatment", "Rel. Prop")

rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = "Treatment", y = '`Rel. Prop`', group='`Sub-type`', cols = NULL)
rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = '`Sub-type`', y = '`Rel. Prop`', group="Treatment", cols = NULL)
```

K2T classification

```{r}
e7386_epi$k2class <- ifelse(e7386_epi$seurat_clusters %in% c(4,7,3), "Basal", 
                            ifelse(e7386_epi$seurat_clusters %in% c(14,9,8,1), "Suprabasal",
                                   ifelse(e7386_epi$seurat_clusters %in% c(5,6,10), "Cell Cycle",
                                          "Secretory")))

epi_cells <- data.frame(prop.table(table(e7386_epi$k2class, e7386_epi$treatment), margin = 1))
epi_cells$Var1 <- factor(epi_cells$Var1)
epi_cells$Var2 <- factor(epi_cells$Var2)
colnames(epi_cells) <- c("Sub-type", "Treatment", "Rel. Prop")

rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = "Treatment", y = '`Rel. Prop`', group='`Sub-type`', cols = NULL)
rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = '`Sub-type`', y = '`Rel. Prop`', group="Treatment", cols = NULL)

```

```{r}
epi_cells <- data.frame(prop.table(table(e7386_epi$k2class, e7386_epi$treatment), margin = 2))
epi_cells$Var1 <- factor(epi_cells$Var1)
epi_cells$Var2 <- factor(epi_cells$Var2)
colnames(epi_cells) <- c("Sub-type", "Treatment", "Rel. Prop")

rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = "Treatment", y = '`Rel. Prop`', group='`Sub-type`', cols = NULL)
rel_prop_lineplot(df = epi_cells, x = '`Sub-type`', y = '`Rel. Prop`', group="Treatment", cols = NULL)
```


03/09/2024

```{r}
e7386_epi@meta.data <- e7386_epi@meta.data %>%
dplyr::mutate(k2t_sub = case_when(
        (seurat_clusters %in% c(3,4,7)) ~ 'Basal',
        (seurat_clusters %in% c(1,9,14,8,11)) ~ 'Suprabasal',
        (seurat_clusters %in% c(5,6,10)) ~ 'Cell-Cycle',
        (seurat_clusters %in% c(2,12,13)) ~ 'Secretory',
        TRUE ~ 'Unknown'
    ))
```

```{r}
rel_prop_boxplot(obj = e7386_epi, cond1 = "sample", cond2 = "k2t_sub")
```

```{r}
rel_prop_boxplot <- function(obj, cond1, cond2) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 2))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "number")
  dat$treatment <- meta_data$treatment[match(dat$sample, meta_data$Sample_ID)]

d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = cond2, y = "number", fill = "treatment")) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), legend.position = "bottom") +
  ylab("%")
  
d1
}
```



## K2T

11/28

```{r}
# F
k2res1 <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_28_k2res_e7386_epi_clusters_sct_scaledata_actual_F_complete.RDS"))
dendro1 <- K2dendro(k2res1)
ggdendro::ggdendrogram(dendro1) + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20))
#K2Taxonomer::K2dashboard(k2res1, analysis_name = "12_01_K2T_4nqo_e7386_new")

library(dendextend)
# d=color_branches(dendro1,  k=4, col = c("#581485","#900C3f","#FFC30F","#FF5733")) %>% set("branches_lwd", 3)  %>% set("labels_cex", 2)
d <- color_branches(dendro1, k = 4, col = c("#581485","#900C3f","#FFC30F","#FF5733")) %>%
  set("branches_lwd", 3) %>%
  set("labels_cex", 1.4) %>%
  set("labels_col", "black")

# Save with font formatting using par()
pdf(file.path(FIGURES, "Fig4A_dendrogram.pdf"), family = "sans", height = 4, width = 6)
par(font = 2)
plot(d)
dev.off()

# png(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/dendro_epi_subtypes.png"),
#     width     = 6,
#     height    = 3.5,
#     units     = "in",
#     res       = 200,
#     pointsize = 6)
plot(d)
#dev.off()
```

```{r gsva_e7386_boxplot}
gsva_e7386_boxplot <- function(df, condn, ncol, labels_ordered){
 gsvaResT <- df
condition <- condn
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
if (!is.null(labels_ordered)) {
  gsvaResFlat[,paste(condn)] <- factor(gsvaResFlat[,paste(condn)], levels = labels_ordered)
}

g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = paste(condn), y = "value",
    color = "pathway")) + 
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    #ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~paste(condn), scales = "free_y", ncol = ncol) +
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position="bottom")+
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    guides(colour = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g1
}

```


```{r}
scatter_wrap <- function (df, x, y, size) {
  sp1 <- ggpubr::ggscatter(df, x = x, y = y, add = "reg.line", size = size,# Add regressin line
   add.params = list(color = "red", fill = "lightgray"), # Customize reg. line
   conf.int = TRUE # Add confidence interval
)
# Add correlation coefficient
sp1 +  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson") 
}

corr_wrap <- function(df, x, y, names_x, names_y, type, diag) {
  library(corrplot)
  mat1 <- as.matrix(df[,x])
  mat2 <- as.matrix(df[,y])

  colnames(mat2) <- names_y
  colnames(mat1) <- names_x
  cor_mat <- cor(mat1, mat2)

  corrplot::corrplot(corr = (cor_mat), is.corr = T, method = "circle", addCoef.col ='black', col = COL1("YlOrRd"), type = type, diag = diag)
}
```

11/13

```{r}
# gsva_res_puram <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_14_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_puram.RDS"))))
# gsva_res_nqo_e7386 <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_03_4nqo_e7386_epi_diffex_sigs.rds"))))
# gsva_res_hallmark <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_07_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_hallmarks.RDS"))))
# 
# gsva_res_all <- cbind(gsva_res_puram[, c("pEMT", "Stress")], gsva_res_nqo_e7386[, c("e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn")], gsva_res_hallmark[,c("HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING")])
# 
# gsva_res_all <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_13_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_all.RDS"))))
gsva_res_all <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_20_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_all_sct.RDS"))))

```

```{r}
# gsva_res_puram <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_14_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_puram.RDS"))))
# gsva_res_nqo_e7386 <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_03_4nqo_e7386_epi_diffex_sigs.rds"))))
# gsva_res_hallmark <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_07_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_hallmarks.RDS"))))
# 
# gsva_res_all <- cbind(gsva_res_puram[, c("pEMT", "Stress")], gsva_res_nqo_e7386[, c("e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn")], gsva_res_hallmark[,c("HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING")])
# 
# #gsva_res_all <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_13_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_all.RDS"))))
gsva_res_all <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_11_20_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_all_sct.RDS"))))
```


## GSVA Sig. Enrichment

### Epi. Cell Programs

```{r}
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
st_pl_mt <- gsva_res_all[, colnames(gsva_res_all) %in% c("Cell_Cycle", "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia")]
st_pl_mt <- data.frame(st_pl_mt)
st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(st_pl_mt), colnames(e7386_epi))]

st_pl_mt <- rename(st_pl_mt, "EMT"="HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "Diff.1"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Diff.2"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_2")
st_pl_mt <- st_pl_mt[,c("EMT", "pEMT", "Cell_Cycle", "Diff.1", "Diff.2", "Stress", "seurat_clusters")]
# st_pl_mt$group <- factor(ifelse(st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters %in% c(3,4,7), "Basal", 
#                          ifelse(st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,8,9,14,11), "Suprabasal",
#                                ifelse(st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters %in% c(5,6,10), "Cell-Cycle", "Secretory"))))
# 
# st_pl_mt$group <- factor(st_pl_mt$group, levels=c("Secretory", "Cell-Cycle", "Suprabasal", "Basal"))
labels_ordered <- dendextend::get_leaves_attr(dendro1, "label")
# g1 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = st_pl_mt, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
# g1

st_pl_mt_mod1 <- st_pl_mt[colnames(st_pl_mt) %ni% "group"]
g2 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = st_pl_mt_mod1, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
g2
#ggsave(plot=g2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/12_04_epi_cell_states.png"), width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
st_pl_mt <- gsva_res_all[, colnames(gsva_res_all) %in% c("Cell_Cycle", "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia")]
st_pl_mt <- data.frame(st_pl_mt)
st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(st_pl_mt), colnames(e7386_epi))]

st_pl_mt <- rename(st_pl_mt, "EMT"="HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "Diff.1"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Diff.2"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_2")
st_pl_mt <- st_pl_mt[,c("EMT", "pEMT", "Cell_Cycle", "Diff.1", "Diff.2", "Stress", "seurat_clusters")]
# st_pl_mt$group <- factor(ifelse(st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters %in% c(3,4,7), "Basal", 
#                          ifelse(st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters %in% c(1,8,9,14,11), "Suprabasal",
#                                ifelse(st_pl_mt$seurat_clusters %in% c(5,6,10), "Cell-Cycle", "Secretory"))))
# 
# st_pl_mt$group <- factor(st_pl_mt$group, levels=c("Secretory", "Cell-Cycle", "Suprabasal", "Basal"))
labels_ordered <- dendextend::get_leaves_attr(dendro1, "label")
# g1 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = st_pl_mt, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
# g1

st_pl_mt_mod1 <- st_pl_mt[colnames(st_pl_mt) %ni% "group"]
g2 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = st_pl_mt_mod1, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
g2
```


### Hallmark Pathways

```{r fig.width=10}
bern <- gsva_res_all[, colnames(gsva_res_all) %in% c("Cell_Cycle", "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia")]
bern <- data.frame((bern))
bern$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(bern), colnames(e7386_epi))]

bern <- bern[c("Cell_Cycle", "HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "seurat_clusters")]
bern <- dplyr::rename(.data = bern, "EMT"="HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "Diff.1"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Diff.2"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_2")
labels_ordered <- dendextend::get_leaves_attr(dendro1, "label")

g1 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = bern, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
g1
#ggsave(plot=g1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_20_epi_cell_states.png"), width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)

hall <- gsva_res_all[, colnames(gsva_res_all) %in% c("HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "HALLMARK_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE", "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE", "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE",  "HALLMARK_TGF_BETA_SIGNALING", "HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING", "HALLMARK_NOTCH_SIGNALING", "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB", "HALLMARK_WNT_BETA_CATENIN_SIGNALING")]
hall <- data.frame(hall)
colnames(hall) <- gsub(pattern = "HALLMARK_", replacement = "", x = colnames(hall))
colnames(hall) <- dplyr::recode(colnames(hall), "EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION"="EMT", "INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE"="IFN.a", "INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE"="IFN.g", "MTORC1_SIGNALING"="MTORC1", "NOTCH_SIGNALING"="NOTCH", "TGF_BETA_SIGNALING"="TGF.b", "TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB"="TNF.a", "WNT_BETA_CATENIN_SIGNALING"="WNT/b-CAT")
hall$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(hall), colnames(e7386_epi))]

labels_ordered <- dendextend::get_leaves_attr(dendro1, "label")
g1 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = hall, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
g1
```


## GSVA Human Cell Line Sigs.
09/25

```{r fig.width=18, fig.height=6}
human_sigs <- gsva_res_all[, colnames(gsva_res_all) %in% c("e7386.hsc3.up", "e7386.hsc3.dn", "e7386.cal27.up", "e7386.cal27.dn", "e7386.comb.up", "e7386.comb.dn", "icg001.hsc3.up", "icg001.hsc3.dn", "icg001.cal27.up", "icg001.cal27.dn", "icg001.comb.up", "icg001.comb.dn")]
human_sigs <- data.frame((human_sigs))
human_sigs$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(human_sigs), colnames(e7386_epi))]

human_sigs <- human_sigs[c("e7386.hsc3.up", "e7386.hsc3.dn", "e7386.cal27.up", "e7386.cal27.dn", "e7386.comb.up",  "e7386.comb.dn", "icg001.hsc3.up", "icg001.hsc3.dn", "icg001.cal27.up", "icg001.cal27.dn", "icg001.comb.up", "icg001.comb.dn", "seurat_clusters")]
#bern <- dplyr::rename(.data = bern, "EMT"="HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "Diff.1"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Diff.2"= "Epithelial_Differentiation_2")
labels_ordered <- dendextend::get_leaves_attr(dendro1, "label")

g2 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = human_sigs, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
g2
```

## Correlation Analysis

### Stress ~ Plasticity & Wnt/b-cat Activity

```{r}
corr_wrap(df = gsva_res_all,  x=c('Stress'), 
          y=c('pEMT', 'HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION', 'e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn', 'e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn', 'HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING'), 
          names_y = c('pEMT', 'EMT', 'Wnt/b-cat@25', 'Wnt/b-cat@50', 'mTORC1'), 
          names_x = c("Stress"), type = "full", diag = T)

corr_wrap(df = gsva_res_all,  
          x=c('Stress', 'pEMT', 'HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION', 'e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn', 'e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn', 'HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING'), 
          y=c('Stress', 'pEMT', 'HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION', 'e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn', 'e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn', 'HALLMARK_MTORC1_SIGNALING'), 
          names_y = c('Stress', 'pEMT', 'EMT', 'Wnt/b-cat@25', 'Wnt/b-cat@50', 'mTORC1'), 
          names_x = c('Stress', 'pEMT', 'EMT', 'Wnt/b-cat@25', 'Wnt/b-cat@50', 'mTORC1'), 
          type = "lower", diag = F)
```


### Stress ~ AP-1 genes

```{r}
stress_cc <- data.frame(gsva_res_all)
stress_cc <- stress_cc[ , colnames(stress_cc) %in% c("Stress"), drop=F]
stress_cc$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(rownames(stress_cc), colnames(e7386_epi))]

stress_ge <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(e7386_epi@assays$RNA@scale.data[c('JUN', 'FOS', 'JUNB', 'FOSB', 'FOSL1', 'BMI1'), ])))
df <- cbind(stress_cc, stress_ge)

s1 <- scatter_wrap(df = df, x = "Stress", y = "JUN", size = 0)
s2 <- scatter_wrap(df = df, x = "Stress", y = "FOS", size = 0)
s3 <- scatter_wrap(df = df, x = "Stress", y = "JUNB", size = 0)
s4 <- scatter_wrap(df = df, x = "Stress", y = "FOSB", size = 0)

s <- ggpubr::ggarrange(s1,s2,s3,s4, ncol = 4, nrow = 1, label.x = "Stress")
s
#ggsave(plot = s, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/12_18_stress_genes.png"), width = 9.5, height = 3, dpi = 300)

scatter_wrap(df = df, x = "Stress", y = "BMI1", size = 0)
```

### Stress ~ Wnt/b-cat Activity

```{r}
stress_cc <- data.frame(gsva_res_all)
stress_cc <- stress_cc[ , colnames(stress_cc) %in% c("Stress", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn"), drop=F]
stress_cc$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(rownames(stress_cc), colnames(e7386_epi))]

s1 <- scatter_wrap(df = stress_cc, x = "Stress", y = "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", size = 0.15)
s1
s2 <- scatter_wrap(df = stress_cc, x = "Stress", y = "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", size = 0.15)
s2

s <- ggpubr::ggarrange(s1,s2, ncol = 2, nrow = 1, label.x = "Stress")
s
#ggsave(plot = s, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/12_21_stress_bcat_dn.png"), width = 7, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```

### CC ~ Plasticity + Diff

```{r}
library(corrplot)
df <- data.frame(gsva_res_all)
mat1 <- as.matrix(df[,c('Cell_Cycle')])
mat2 <- as.matrix(df[,c('pEMT', 'HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION', 'Epithelial_Differentiation_1', 'Epithelial_Differentiation_2')])

colnames(mat2) <- c('pEMT', 'EMT', 'Diff1', 'Diff2')
cor_mat <- cor(mat1, mat2)

corrplot::corrplot(corr = cor_mat, is.corr = T, method = "circle", addCoef.col ='black', col = COL1("YlOrRd"))

#cc_cells <- e7386_epi$cell_id[e7386_epi@meta.data$new_epi_sub %in% c("CC") ]
cc_cells <- e7386_epi$cell_id[e7386_epi@meta.data$seurat_clusters %in% c(5,6,10) ]
df <- data.frame(gsva_res_all[rownames(gsva_res_all) %in% cc_cells,])

# png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/cc_scores_pl_diff.png"), 
#      width     = 4,
#     height    = 3,
#     units     = "in",
#     res       = 200,
#     pointsize = 6)
corr_wrap(df = df,  x=c('Cell_Cycle'), y=c('pEMT', 'HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION', 'Epithelial_Differentiation_1', 'Epithelial_Differentiation_2'), 
          names_y = c('pEMT', 'EMT', 'Diff.1', 'Diff.2'), names_x = c("CC"), type = "full", diag = T)
#dev.off()

```




## Leading edge analysis
08/04

```{r}
exp_gsva_res <- gsva_res_all
gsva_res_df <- data.frame((exp_gsva_res))
gsva_res_df$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(gsva_res_df))]
gsva_res_df$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(gsva_res_df))]
```

Arrange the cells by the Stress GSVA scores

![Heatmap](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_gsva_epi-sub.png){width=100%, height=100%}


```{r eval=F}
gsva_res_df$new_epi_sub <- e7386_epi$new_epi_sub[match(colnames(e7386_epi), rownames(gsva_res_df))]
gsva_res_df_stress <- gsva_res_df[, c("Stress", "treatment", "seurat_clusters", "new_epi_sub")]
#gsva_res_df_stress %>% arrange(.by_group = "Stress")

#gsva_res_df_stress[order(gsva_res_df_stress$Stress, decreasing = T), ]

stress_mat <- as.matrix(gsva_res_df_stress$Stress)
rownames(stress_mat) <- rownames(gsva_res_df_stress)
colnames(stress_mat) <- "Stress"

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(treatment = gsva_res_df_stress$treatment,
                            clusters = gsva_res_df_stress$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(treatment = c("control" = "white",
                                                     "4NQO control" = "black",
                                                     "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg" = "pink", 
                                                     "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg" = "salmon")))

png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_gsva.png"),   
    width     = 20,
    height    = 5,
    units     = "in",
    res       = 200,
    pointsize = 4)
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(t(stress_mat), name = "GSVA",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, show_row_names = F, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        clustering_distance_rows ="euclidean",
                        clustering_method_rows="ward.D", 
                        column_split=gsva_res_df_stress$seurat_clusters)
dev.off()

# by epi sub
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(treatment = gsva_res_df_stress$treatment,
                            epi_sub = gsva_res_df_stress$new_epi_sub,
                            col = list(treatment = c("control" = "white",
                                                     "4NQO control" = "black",
                                                     "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg" = "pink", 
                                                     "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg" = "salmon")))

png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_gsva_epi-sub.png"),   
    width     = 20,
    height    = 5,
    units     = "in",
    res       = 200,
    pointsize = 4)
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(t(stress_mat), name = "GSVA",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, show_row_names = F, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        clustering_distance_rows =" euclidean",
                        clustering_method_rows = "ward.D", 
                        column_split = gsva_res_df_stress$new_epi_sub, column_title_rot = 90)
dev.off()

```

### Stress genes

![Heatmap](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_new.png){width=100%, height=100%}

```{r eval=F}
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
bern_sigs <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "data/bernstein_hnsc_mouse.rds"))
exp_mat <- t(as.matrix(e7386_epi@assays$SCT@data))
exp_mat_sub <- exp_mat[, colnames(exp_mat) %in% bern_sigs$Stress]

top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(treatment = gsva_res_df_stress$treatment,
                            clusters = gsva_res_df_stress$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(treatment = c("control" = "white",
                                                     "4NQO control" = "black",
                                                     "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg" = "pink", 
                                                     "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg" = "salmon")))

dend = as.dendrogram(hclust(dist(t(exp_mat_sub)), method = 'ward.D'))

od = order.dendrogram(dend)

stress_genes <- c("JUN", "FOS", "FOSB", "JUNB")

selected1 = od[which(labels(dend) %in% stress_genes)]
selected2 = od[which(labels(dend) %ni% stress_genes)]

#png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress.png"), width = 750, height = 600, units = )
png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_new.png"),   
    width     = 20,
    height    = 20,
    units     = "in",
    res       = 400,
    pointsize = 4)
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(t(exp_mat_sub), name = "GE",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, show_row_names = T, 
                        show_column_names = F,  cluster_rows = dend, cluster_columns = T,
                        # clustering_distance_rows ="euclidean",
                        # clustering_method_rows="ward.D", 
                        column_split=gsva_res_df_stress$seurat_clusters) +
   rowAnnotation(link1 = anno_mark(at = selected1, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames(t(exp_mat_sub))[selected1], side = "right",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "red"
                                                 ))) +
   rowAnnotation(link2 = anno_mark(at = selected2, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames(t(exp_mat_sub))[selected2], side = "right",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "black"
                                                 )))
dev.off()

#corrplot::corrplot(cor(stress_mat, jun_fos_mat), is.corr = F)
```


### Heatmap on all cells, top 500

![Heatmap](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_31_heatmap_stress_gsva_4nqo.png){width=100%, height=100%}

```{r eval=F}
stress_gsva <- data.frame(t(exp_gsva_res))
stress_gsva <- stress_gsva[,'Stress', drop=FALSE]
stress_gsva <- stress_gsva[order(stress_gsva$Stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE]

stress_gsva$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(rownames(stress_gsva), colnames(e7386_epi))]
stress_gsva$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(stress_gsva), colnames(e7386_epi))]

epi_top_2k <- as.matrix(e7386_epi@assays$SCT@data[e7386_epi@assays$SCT@var.features[1:500], rownames(stress_gsva)])

# corr
epi_cor <- data.frame(cor(x = t(epi_top_2k), y = stress_gsva$Stress))
colnames(epi_cor) <- 'cor_stress'

epi_cor_mod <- data.frame(cor_stress=epi_cor[order(epi_cor$cor_stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE])

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(treatment = stress_gsva$treatment, 
                            Stress = anno_barplot(x = stress_gsva$Stress, beside = T, which = "column"),
                            clusters = stress_gsva$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(treatment =  c("control" = "white",
                                                     "4NQO control" = "black",
                                                     "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg" = "pink", 
                                                     "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg" = "salmon"),
                                       clusters = c("1"="grey",
                                                    "2"="grey",
                                                    "3"="grey",
                                                    "4"="red",
                                                    "5"="grey",
                                                    "6"="grey",
                                                    "7"="grey",
                                                    "8"="grey",
                                                    "9"="grey",
                                                    "10"="grey",
                                                    "11"="red",
                                                    "12"="grey",
                                                    "13"="grey",
                                                    "14"="grey")))

# arrange rows by corr values
epi_top_2k_mod <- epi_top_2k[rownames(epi_cor_mod), ]
stress_genes <- c("JUN", "FOS", "FOSB", "JUNB")

selected1 = which(rownames(epi_top_2k_mod) %in% stress_genes)
selected2 = which(rownames(epi_top_2k_mod) %ni% stress_genes)

epi_top_2k_mod_scaled <- t(scale(t(epi_top_2k_mod)))

png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_31_heatmap_stress_gsva_4nqo.png"),
width     = 10,
height    = 20,
units     = "in",
res       = 400,
pointsize = 10)
#top_bar_anno <- (t(gsva_res_bern %>% select('Stress')))
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap((epi_top_2k_mod_scaled), name = "GE",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        cluster_columns = F, 
                        # clustering_distance_columns  ="euclidean",
                        # clustering_method_columns="ward.D",
                        cluster_rows = F) +
 rowAnnotation(link1 = anno_mark(at = selected1, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((epi_top_2k_mod))[selected1], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "red"
                                                 ))) +
   rowAnnotation(link2 = anno_mark(at = selected2, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((epi_top_2k_mod))[selected2], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "black"
                                                 ))) +
  rowAnnotation(corr = anno_barplot(x = epi_cor_mod$cor_stress))
dev.off()

```


### Heatmap on all cells, top 50

![Heatmap](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_31_heatmap_stress_gsva_4nqo_small.png){width=100%, height=100%}


```{r eval=F}
stress_gsva <- data.frame(t(exp_gsva_res))
stress_gsva <- stress_gsva[,'Stress', drop=FALSE]
stress_gsva <- stress_gsva[order(stress_gsva$Stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE]

stress_gsva$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(rownames(stress_gsva), colnames(e7386_epi))]
stress_gsva$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(stress_gsva), colnames(e7386_epi))]

epi_top_2k <- as.matrix(e7386_epi@assays$SCT@data[e7386_epi@assays$SCT@var.features[1:500], rownames(stress_gsva)])

# corr
epi_cor <- data.frame(cor(x = t(epi_top_2k), y = stress_gsva$Stress))
colnames(epi_cor) <- 'cor_stress'

epi_cor_mod <- data.frame(cor_stress=epi_cor[order(epi_cor$cor_stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE])

epi_cor_mod_small <- epi_cor_mod[1:50,, drop=F]

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(treatment = stress_gsva$treatment, 
                            Stress = anno_barplot(x = stress_gsva$Stress, beside = T, which = "column"),
                            clusters = stress_gsva$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(treatment =  c("control" = "white",
                                                     "4NQO control" = "black",
                                                     "4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg" = "pink", 
                                                     "4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg" = "salmon"),
                                       clusters = c("1"="grey",
                                                    "2"="grey",
                                                    "3"="grey",
                                                    "4"="red",
                                                    "5"="grey",
                                                    "6"="grey",
                                                    "7"="grey",
                                                    "8"="grey",
                                                    "9"="grey",
                                                    "10"="grey",
                                                    "11"="red",
                                                    "12"="grey",
                                                    "13"="grey",
                                                    "14"="grey")))

# arrange rows by corr values
epi_top_2k_mod <- epi_top_2k[rownames(epi_cor_mod_small), ]
stress_genes <- c("JUN", "FOS", "FOSB", "JUNB")

selected1 = which(rownames(epi_top_2k_mod) %in% stress_genes)
selected2 = which(rownames(epi_top_2k_mod) %ni% stress_genes)

epi_top_2k_mod_scaled <- t(scale(t(epi_top_2k_mod)))



png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_31_heatmap_stress_gsva_4nqo_small.png"),
width     = 10,
height    = 10,
units     = "in",
res       = 400,
pointsize = 10)
#top_bar_anno <- (t(gsva_res_bern %>% select('Stress')))
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap((epi_top_2k_mod_scaled), name = "GE",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        cluster_columns = F, 
                        # clustering_distance_columns  ="euclidean",
                        # clustering_method_columns="ward.D",
                        cluster_rows = F) +
 rowAnnotation(link1 = anno_mark(at = selected1, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((epi_top_2k_mod_scaled))[selected1], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "red"
                                                 ))) +
   rowAnnotation(link2 = anno_mark(at = selected2, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((epi_top_2k_mod_scaled))[selected2], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "black"
                                                 ))) +
  rowAnnotation(corr = anno_barplot(x = epi_cor_mod_small$cor_stress))
dev.off()
```


## Cytotrace

05/13

Cytotrace to obtain differentiation profiles

Change gene names to title case

```{r}
library(stringr)
RenameGenesSeurat <- function(obj, RNA_newnames_list, SCT_newnames_list) { # Replace gene names in different slots of a Seurat object. Run this before integration. Run this before integration. It only changes obj@assays$RNA@counts, @data and @scale.data.
  print("Run this before integration. It only changes obj@assays$RNA@counts, @data and @scale.data.")
  RNA <- obj@assays$RNA
  SCT <- obj@assays$SCT
  
  RNA@counts@Dimnames[[1]] <- RNA_newnames_list[[1]]
  RNA@data@Dimnames[[1]] <- RNA_newnames_list[[2]]
  rownames(RNA@scale.data) <- RNA_newnames_list[[3]]
  
  SCT@counts@Dimnames[[1]] <- SCT_newnames_list[[1]]
  SCT@data@Dimnames[[1]] <- SCT_newnames_list[[2]]
  rownames(SCT@scale.data) <- SCT_newnames_list[[3]]
  
  obj@assays$RNA <- RNA
  obj@assays$SCT <- SCT
  
  return(obj)
}

RNA_newnames_list <- list(counts=str_to_title(rownames(e7386_epi@assays$RNA@counts)), data=str_to_title(rownames(e7386_epi@assays$RNA@data)), scale.data=str_to_title(rownames(e7386_epi@assays$RNA@scale.data)))
SCT_newnames_list <- list(counts=str_to_title(rownames(e7386_epi@assays$SCT@counts)), data=str_to_title(rownames(e7386_epi@assays$SCT@data)), scale.data=str_to_title(rownames(e7386_epi@assays$SCT@scale.data)))

e7386_epi_mouse <- RenameGenesSeurat(obj = e7386_epi, RNA_newnames_list = RNA_newnames_list, SCT_newnames_list = SCT_newnames_list)
```

```{r}
library(CytoTRACE2)
e7386_epi_mouse <- CytoTRACE2::cytotrace2(input = e7386_epi_mouse, slot_type = "counts", species = "mouse", is_seurat = T)
plots_mouse <- plotData(cytotrace2_result = e7386_epi_mouse, 
                  annotation = e7386_epi_mouse@meta.data,
                  expression_data = as.matrix(e7386_epi_mouse@assays$RNA@counts), is_seurat = T
                  )
plots_mouse$CytoTRACE2_UMAP
plots_mouse$CytoTRACE2_Potency_UMAP
plots_mouse$CytoTRACE2_Relative_UMAP
```


```{r}
df <- e7386_epi_mouse@meta.data
df$treatment_mod <- recode(df$treatment, '4NQO + E7386; 25 mg/kg' = 'E7386', '4NQO+ E7386; 50 mg/kg'= 'E7386')
df$treatment_mod <- factor(df$treatment_mod, levels = c("control", "4NQO control", "E7386"))

df_cc <- df %>% filter(seurat_clusters %in% c(5,6,10))

ggplot(df, aes(x = CytoTRACE2_Relative, y = seurat_clusters))+geom_boxplot()+coord_flip()
ggplot(df, aes(x = CytoTRACE2_Score, y = seurat_clusters))+geom_boxplot()+coord_flip()


ggplot(df, aes(x = CytoTRACE2_Relative, y = seurat_clusters))+geom_boxplot()+facet_wrap(~treatment)+coord_flip()

ggplot(df_cc, aes(x = CytoTRACE2_Relative, y = treatment_mod))+geom_boxplot()+facet_wrap(seurat_clusters~.)+coord_flip()
```



```{r}
ge_boxplot <- function(genes, obj, cond, ncol){
  df <- data.frame(t(as.matrix(obj@assays$RNA@scale.data[c(genes),])))
  condition <- cond
  #cond <- apply(obj[, cond, drop = FALSE], 1, paste, collapse = "_")
  df[, paste(cond)] <-  apply(obj@meta.data[, cond, drop = FALSE],1, paste, collapse = "_")
  df[, paste(cond)] <- factor(obj$treatment)

  gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(df, id.vars = paste(cond, collapse = "_"), variable.name = "group")

  g1 <- ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = paste(condition, collapse = "_"), y = "value",
    color = paste(condition, collapse = "_"))) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    #ggplot2::geom_jitter(size=0.0) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~group, scale = "free_y",
                        ncol = ncol) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format')+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
    labs(title = 'Gene Expression', y = "log-Norm Counts", x = cond)+
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
  g1
}
```


```{r}
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = "HELLS", group.by = "treatment")
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = "HELLS", group.by = "treatment")

```

Stress Subset

```{r}
stress_epi <- subset(e7386_epi, new_epi_sub == "Stress")

d1 <-DotPlot(object = stress_epi, features = c("EGFR", "PDGFRB", "VEGFA", "HIF1A", 'BMI1', 'ALDH7A1', 'SOX2', 'CD44', 'PROM1', 'ALDH1A3'), group.by = "treatment", assay = "SCT", scale = T) + theme_bw()+ ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x =  ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold",), axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial", face = "bold"), panel.grid = element_blank(), 
                 axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),  axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10, family = "Arial", face = "bold"), 
                 legend.text =  ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
                 legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
                 axis.title.y.left = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial", face = "bold"))+
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) 
d1
##ggsave(plot = d1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/02_09_stress_csc_genes.png"), width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)


VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1', 'ALDH7A1', 'SOX2', 'CD44', 'PROM1', 'ALDH1A3'), group.by = "seurat_clusters", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0)
```


## Check for GE 

```{r}
v1 <- VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT4", "KRT13",  "KRT5", "KRT14", "KRT15", "TGM3", "KRTDAP"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + NoLegend()
v2 <- VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDC20", "AURKA"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+ NoLegend()
v3 <- VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("JUNB", "FOS", "FOSB", "FOSL1"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+ NoLegend()
v4 <- VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("MUC5B", "AQP5", "BPIFA2", "BPIFB1"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+ NoLegend()
v5 <- VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("PDPN", "VIM", "CDH1"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+ NoLegend()
                                         #    , , "PDPN", "VIM", 
                                         # "TRP63", "SOX2", "ECM1", "MUC1", "CDH1", "MYC", "KLF4", "CD34"
v1
v2
v3
v4
v5

# ggsave(plot = v1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_07_vlnplot_epi1.png"), width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 200)
# ggsave(plot = v2, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_07_vlnplot_epi2.png"), width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 200)
# ggsave(plot = v3, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_07_vlnplot_epi3.png"), width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 200)
# ggsave(plot = v4, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_07_vlnplot_epi4.png"), width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 200)


VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + NoLegend()
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + NoLegend()

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT16", "KRT8", "CLDN4"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "SCT") + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT16", "CLDN4"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT") + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

cc_sub <- subset(e7386_epi, seurat_clusters %in%  c(5,6,10))
VlnPlot(object = cc_sub, features = c("KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + NoLegend()
VlnPlot(object = cc_sub, features = c("KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + NoLegend()

DotPlot(object = cc_sub, features = c("KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B", "CLDN4"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "RNA") + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

VlnPlot(object = cc_sub, features = c("MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDK1"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "RNA", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
VlnPlot(object = cc_sub, features = c("MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDK1", "KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0, slot = "scale.data", stack = T, flip = T) + ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

d1 <- DotPlot(object = cc_sub, features = c("MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDK1", "KRT16", "KRT8", "SPRR1B"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "SCT", cols = c("white", "purple")) + theme_bw()+ ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold",), axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial", face = "bold"), panel.grid = element_blank(), 
                 axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),  axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10, family = "Arial", face = "bold"), 
                 legend.text =  ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
                 legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial", face = "bold"),
                 axis.title.y.left = ggplot2::element_text(size = 13, family = "Arial", face = "bold"))+
  scale_y_discrete(limits=rev) 
d1
#ggsave(plot = d1, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/11_27_cc_genes.png"), width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```


## CSCs
 
```{r}
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1'), group.by = "seurat_clusters") 
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1'), group.by = "seurat_clusters")
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1'), group.by = "treatment")

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1', 'ALDH7A1', 'SOX2', 'CD44', 'PROM1', 'ALDH1A3'), group.by = "seurat_clusters") 
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1', 'ALDH7A1', 'SOX2', 'CD44', 'PROM1', 'ALDH1A3'), group.by = "new_epi_sub") 

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c('BMI1', 'ALDH7A1', 'SOX2', 'CD44', 'PROM1', 'ALDH1A3'), group.by = "new_epi_sub") 

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("EGFR", "PDGFRB", "VEGFA", "BMI1"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT")
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("EGFR", "PDGFRB", "VEGFA", "BMI1"), group.by = "new_epi_sub", assay = "SCT", pt.size = 0)


```

## Apoptosis

```{r}

KEGG <- hypeR::msigdb_gsets(species="Mus musculus", category = 'C2', subcategory = 'CP:KEGG')
kegg_apop <- list("apop"=toupper(KEGG$genesets$KEGG_APOPTOSIS))
e7386_epi <- AddModuleScore(object = e7386_epi, features = kegg_apop, assay = "RNA", name = "KEGG_apop")

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = "KEGG_apop1", group.by = "treatment") 

FeaturePlot(e7386_epi, features  = "KEGG_apop1")

VlnPlot(e7386_epi, features  = "KEGG_apop1", group.by = c("seurat_clusters"), sort = T,pt.size = 0)
```


```{r fig.width=10}
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("EPCAM", "CDH1")) # epi markers

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("UNG", "MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDC20", "AURKA"), group.by = "treatment") # Prolif markers

DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("COL1A1", "COL3A1"))

VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("ITGB1"), group.by = "new_epi_clust", assay = "RNA", pt.size = 0)

VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("JUN", "FOS"), group.by = "treatment", assay = "RNA", pt.size = 0)


VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("BMI1", "KRTDAP"), group.by = "new_epi_clust", assay = "RNA", pt.size = 0)

FeaturePlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("BMI1", "KRTDAP", "KRT6A", "MKI67"))

Idents(e7386_epi) <- "seurat_clusters"
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT4", "KRT13",  "KRT5", "KRT14", "KRT15", "KRT17", "KRT19", "TGM3", "KRTDAP", "MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDC20", "AURKA",
                                              "JUNB", "FOS", "FOSB", "FOSL1",  "FOSL2", "MUC5B", "AQP5", "BPIFA2", "BHLHA15", "PDPN", "VIM", 
                                         "TRP63", "SOX2", "ECM1", "MUC1", "CDH1", "MYC", "KLF4", "CD34"), cluster.idents = T, assay = "SCT", scale.by = "size")+
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))





DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = c("KRT4", "KRT13",  "KRT5", "KRT14", "KRT15", "KRT17", "KRT19", "TGM3", "KRTDAP", "MKI67", "TOP2A", "CDC20", "AURKA",
                                              "JUNB", "FOS", "FOSB", "FOSL1",  "FOSL2", "MUC5B", "AQP5", "BPIFA2", "BHLHA15", "PDPN", "VIM", 
                                         "TRP63", "SOX2", "ECM1", "MUC1", "CDH1", "MYC", "KLF4", "CD34", "EPCAM"), group.by = "new_epi_clust", assay = "RNA", scale.by = "size")+
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

bcat_genes <- c('AXIN1', 'AXIN2', 'APC', 'APC2', 'WNT7B', 'FZD3', 'HNF1A', 'TCF12', 'MYC', 'CDH1', 'CDKN2A', 'EFNB3', 'VEGFA', 'SOX2', 'SOX9')
DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = bcat_genes, group.by = "treatment", assay = "RNA", scale.by = "size")+
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


DotPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = bcat_genes, group.by = "new_epi_clust", assay = "RNA", scale.by = "size")+
  ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```


## Cell Cycle Scoring

```{r}
bern_sigs <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "data/bernstein_hnsc_mouse.rds"))

# loaded with seurat
cc.genes.seurat <- c(cc.genes$s.genes, cc.genes$g2m.genes)

table(bern_sigs$Cell_Cycle %in% cc.genes.seurat)
```

```{r}
e7386_epi_cc <- CellCycleScoring(e7386_epi, s.features = cc.genes$s.genes, g2m.features = cc.genes$g2m.genes, set.ident = TRUE)

# view cell cycle scores and phase assignments
head(e7386_epi_cc[[]])

# Running a PCA on cell cycle genes reveals, unsurprisingly, that cells separate entirely by
# phase
e7386_epi_cc <- RunPCA(e7386_epi_cc, features = c(cc.genes$s.genes, cc.genes$g2m.genes))
DimPlot(e7386_epi_cc)
```


```{r gene_expression_boxplot_wrapper}

ge_boxplot <- function(genes, obj, cond, ncol){
  mat <- (scale(t(as.matrix(obj@assays$SCT@counts))))
  df <- data.frame(mat[, c(genes)])
  condition <- cond
  #cond <- apply(obj[, cond, drop = FALSE], 1, paste, collapse = "_")
  df[, paste(cond)] <-  apply(obj@meta.data[, cond, drop = FALSE],1, paste, collapse = "_")
  df[, paste(cond)] <- factor(obj$treatment)

  gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(df, id.vars = paste(cond, collapse = "_"), variable.name = "group")

  g1 <- ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = paste(condition, collapse = "_"), y = "value",
    color = paste(condition, collapse = "_"))) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    #ggplot2::geom_jitter(size=0.0) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~group, scale = "free_y",
                        ncol = ncol) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format')+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
    labs(title = 'Gene Expression', y = "log-Norm Counts", x = cond)+
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
  g1
}

ge_boxplot(genes  = c('BMI1', 'ALDH7A1', 'SOX2', 'CD44', 'PROM1', 'ALDH1A3'), obj = e7386_epi, cond  = "treatment", ncol = 4)

```



## NSLC B-cat genes

Gene expr patterns don't look convincing of either groups, do GSVA instead

```{r}
bcat_genes <- list("bcat"= c('AXIN1', 'AXIN2', 'APC', 'APC2', 'WNT7B', 'FZD3', 'HNF1A', 'TCF12', 'MYC', 'CDH1', 'CDKN2A', 'EFNB3', 'VEGFA', 'SOX2', 'SOX9'))
bcat_genes$bcat %in% rownames(e7386_epi@assays$RNA@data)
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = bcat_genes$bcat[1:5], group.by = "treatment", pt.size = 0, assay = "SCT", slot = "data")
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = bcat_genes$bcat[6:10], group.by = "treatment", pt.size = 0, assay = "SCT", slot = "data")
VlnPlot(object = e7386_epi, features = bcat_genes$bcat[11:15], group.by = "treatment", pt.size = 0, assay = "SCT", slot = "data")
```
```{r}
gsva_bcat <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/04_14_e7386_bcat.rds"))))
gsva_bcat$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(gsva_bcat), colnames(e7386_epi))]
gsva_bcat$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(rownames(gsva_bcat), colnames(e7386_epi))]
gsva_bcat$subtype <- e7386_epi$new_epi_clust[match(rownames(gsva_bcat), colnames(e7386_epi))]
```

```{r}
bcat_gsvaplot <- function(cond){
  if(cond == "subtype") {
    gsvaResT <- gsva_bcat[,c('bcat', 'subtype', 'treatment')]
    condn <- as.list(gsvaResT[, 'subtype' ,drop = FALSE])
    gsvaResT[, paste('subtype', collapse = "_")] <- condn
    gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = c('subtype', 'treatment'),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
    g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "treatment", y = "value",
    color = paste(cond))) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(facets = "subtype", ncol = 9)+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
  } else {
    gsvaResT <- gsva_bcat[,c('bcat', cond)]
    condn <- as.list(gsvaResT[, cond ,drop = FALSE])
    gsvaResT[, paste(cond, collapse = "_")] <- condn
    gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(cond,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
    g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = paste(cond), y = "value",
    color = paste(cond))) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
    geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
  }
 g1
}

bcat_gsvaplot(cond = "treatment")
bcat_gsvaplot(cond = "seurat_clusters")
bcat_gsvaplot(cond = "subtype")
#ggsave(plot = g1, filename = file.path(PATH, "results/4nqo_e7386_images/gsva_e7386_epi.png"), width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```



## Senescence and CC

```{r}
puram_sene_xl <- readxl::read_xlsx(path  = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/Puram_senescence.xlsx"), sheet = 6, skip = 1)
puram_sene_sig <- list("puram_senes"=puram_sene_xl$EpiSen_Signature[!is.na(puram_sene_xl$EpiSen_Signature)])

mayo_sene_xl <- readxl::read_xlsx(path  = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/senmayo_sigs.xlsx"), sheet = 2)
mayo_sene_sig <- list("mayo_senes"=toupper(mayo_sene_xl$`Gene(murine)`))

mayo_sene_sig$mayo_senes[mayo_sene_sig$mayo_senes %in% puram_sene_sig$puram_senes]

```

```{r}

gsva_res_sene <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_19_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_puram_sene.RDS"))
gsva_res_puram <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_14_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_puram.RDS"))
gsva_res_mayo <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH,"mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_09_27_gsva_nqo_epi_e7386_mayo_sene.RDS"))

gsva_res_sene <- data.frame(t(gsva_res_sene))
gsva_res_puram <- data.frame(t(gsva_res_puram))
gsva_res_mayo <- data.frame(t(gsva_res_mayo))

gsva_res_sene$cc <- gsva_res_puram$Cell_Cycle
gsva_res_sene$mayo_sene <- gsva_res_mayo$mayo_senes

gsva_res_sene$seurat_clusters <- e7386_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(gsva_res_sene), colnames(e7386_epi))]

labels_ordered <- dendextend::get_leaves_attr(dendro1, "label")
colnames(gsva_res_sene) <- c("Puram_S", "CC", "Mayo_S", "seurat_clusters")
gsva_res_sene <- gsva_res_sene[,c( "CC", "Puram_S", "Mayo_S", "seurat_clusters")]
g1 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = gsva_res_sene, cond = "seurat_clusters", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = labels_ordered)
g1

e7386_epi$puram_cc_scores <- exp_gsva_res[colnames(exp_gsva_res) %in% c("Cell_Cycle")]
e7386_epi$puram_senes_scores <- gsva_res_sene$Puram_S

FeaturePlot(e7386_epi, features = c("puram_cc_scores", "puram_senes_scores"), label = T, split.by = "treatment")
FeaturePlot(e7386_epi, features = "puram_senes_scores")

```

```{r}
gsva_res_sene_trt <- gsva_res_sene[!colnames(gsva_res_sene) %in% "seurat_clusters" ]
gsva_res_sene_trt$treatment <- e7386_epi$treatment[match(rownames(gsva_res_sene_trt), colnames(e7386_epi))]
g1 <- gsva_e7386_boxplot(df = gsva_res_sene_trt, cond = "treatment", ncol = 5, labels_ordered = NULL)
g1
```
